theme.description: A premium nail salon in Kraków. The tone is warm, high-end editorial, and welcoming. We are moving away from sterile clinical looks and generic SaaS/booking interfaces.
theme.mode: Light mode primary, elegant deep charcoal dark mode.

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-light tracking-tight leading-none
hierarchy.h2: text-3xl sm:text-4xl lg:text-5xl font-normal tracking-tight leading-tight

spacing_and_layout.bento_grid: Grid items must be direct children of grid containers. Use col-span-1 md:col-span-4 style classes.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-full px-8 py-4 transition-all duration-300
buttons.secondary: border border-border bg-transparent hover:bg-surface rounded-full px-8 py-4 transition-all duration-300

cards.base: bg-surface rounded-3xl p-8 sm:p-12 border border-border/50

hero.layout: Grid split (text on right, image on left per problem statement). lg:grid-cols-12 gap-12 items-center.
hero.image: lg:col-span-5 lg:order-first order-last. Tall aspect ratio, soft rounded corners.
hero.text: lg:col-span-7 lg:order-last order-first. H1, subtitle, and buttons.
hero.trust_indicators: Flex row with stars (★★★★★), rating 4.9, and '632+ opinii'.

about.layout: Tetris Grid. Large heading, followed by 4 cards (Precyzja wykonania, Komfort wizyty, etc.). Use Lucide icons (fine, elegant strokes).

services.layout: Editorial list style. Instead of small cards, use large full-width rows with a bottom border that expand or show subtle hover effects.
services.content: Categories: MANICURE, PRZEDŁUŻANIE, PEDICURE, BRWI I RZĘSY.

why_clients_return.layout: Grid of 6. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3. Minimalist bento cards.

gallery.layout: Customized Shadcn Tabs for the 6 categories (Natural, French, Extensions, Minimal, Elegant, Pedicure). Underneath, a masonry or simple grid of large images.

reviews.layout: Large typographic cards. Use react-fast-marquee if possible, or a horizontally scrolling container. Focus on the text 'Dokładnie taki efekt...'

booking.layout: Massive central card with deep background (soft nude in light mode, charcoal in dark mode). Center aligned content.

location.layout: Split layout. Address and amenities (Wi-Fi, Parking, etc.) on one side, Map or elegant exterior photo on the other.

instagram.layout: Grid of 4 or 5 images, edge-to-edge or gap-4. CTA overlay on hover.

footer.layout: Minimal. Large 'Moon Beauty Space' wordmark. Simple links.

framer_variants.container: variants={{ hidden: { opacity: 0 }, visible: { opacity: 1, transition: { staggerChildren: 0.1 } } }}
framer_variants.item: variants={{ hidden: { opacity: 0, y: 20 }, visible: { opacity: 1, y: 0, transition: { duration: 0.6, ease: [0.22, 1, 0.36, 1] } } }}

motion.guidance: Use whileInView={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} viewport={{ once: true }} heavily for scroll reveals. Keep it subtle, not bouncy.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use .js/.jsx extensions for all React components, NOT .tsx.
Inject fonts using Google Fonts imports in index.css (Cormorant Garamond and Manrope).
Configure tailwind.config.js to include the custom colors listed above under 'extend: colors' using CSS variables to support dark mode.
Implement Shadcn UI components but override their default borders and radii to match the luxury theme.
Ensure ALL interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs, tabs) have a data-testid attribute for testing.
Do NOT use placeholder images. Only use the URLs provided in this JSON.
Maintain the Polish text provided in the prompt exactly as requested.
